_comment: GM VIP Automation Framework – editable configuration file.
_comment2: Edit only the values relevant to your setup. t32_exe_path and t32_config_path are only needed when auto_launch=True and Trace32 is not already running.
_comment3: Optional: path to a *.cmm startup script. When set and Trace32 needs to be launched, it is passed via '-s <cmm_entry_script>'. Leave empty when Trace32 is already running.
_comment4: Synchronization timing. post_reset_settle_s: extra wait after SYStem.RESetTarget halts (lets T32 rebuild symbol/register state). go_settle_s: brief pause after GO before polling STATE.RUN().
